title: NMiAI Grocery Bot — actions message
description: Client-to-server message sent each round with one action per bot. Must respond within 2 seconds.

bot.description: Bot ID matching a bot in game_state.bots

action.description: Action to perform. move_*: move one cell in direction (y-1=up, y+1=down, x-1=left, x+1=right). pick_up: pick item from adjacent shelf (requires item_id). drop_off: deliver inventory at drop-off cell. wait: do nothing.

item_id.description: Required only for pick_up action. Must match an item on the map adjacent (Manhattan distance 1) to the bot.

actions.description: One action per bot. Must include all bots. Actions resolve in bot ID order (bot 0 first).
